---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for CinePlete
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.
_Example: "I find it frustrating when..."_

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Media Server

Which media server(s) does this apply to?

- [ ] Plex
- [ ] Jellyfin
- [ ] Emby
- [ ] All / not server-specific

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've already tried.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, or examples from other tools are welcome.
